num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7215408637601123383","book_info":{"abstract":"【沙雕文】【搞笑文】【诸天万界】
【黄金精神】【漆黑意志】【近战法师】【磁场转动】
【大脑寄存处】
【素晴】为常驻日常世界，主打沙雕欢乐日常，去其他世界历练。
【JOJO】【一人之下】【鬼灭之刃】【火影】【风云漫画版】混合副本
青木微末时，获得了一个莫名其妙的技能。
用这个莫名其妙的技能制作了莫名其妙的系统，然后用这个莫名其妙的系统进行莫名其妙的诸天冒险。
总而言之，就挺莫名其妙的....
从风云世界逃出一劫，青木来到了一个莫名的空间。
看见阿库娅的瞬间，青木就知道这是沙雕素晴世界
初入【海虎】，死里逃生。再入【风云】，钓上麒麟。
穿越【素晴】，逐渐沙雕。打团迪奥，开启替身。
【一人之下】，电流推动。【鬼灭】之拳，有点变态。
魔改【火影战国】，邪恶青木降临，整活还挺行。
【海虎】一行，癫磁王的宝藏。想要癫磁王的宝藏吗？
收集六个强者性转妹子，你就可以获得【癫磁王·邪恶青木】的宝藏。
【风云】...
【变形金刚·魔改版】，外星邪恶青木降临。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d891ca3aad1e222506c86aa6719524cb","author":"佘山樘","author_id":"","book_id":"7215408637601123383","book_name":"二次元，爷来了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#304858","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":368,"name":"火影","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=368&name=火影&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7215525834097066511","read_count":"11468","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"700696"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"596","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,诸天万界,火影,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0b1a969d2b830bc0517aec9ce750f3d8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779286751&x-signature=Agp1CsZ%2FUCUJhaQLGHGgzEmxGE0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"369857389139678","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"652"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321221911B80D9A6CBE9CCE2DA1A4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_
